module.name: common
module.purpose: Shared configuration, logging, message envelopes, remoc SessionEvent lifecycle/create/cancel events, TaskEvent tool invocation/status query/status return signals, common ToolSchema/ToolParameter/ToolInvocation/ToolSignature/ToolExecutionStatus/ToolType/ToolPreview/ToolError protocol types, and crate-local external-library namespaces.

childModules.name: channel
childModules.purpose: Shared channel error type, narrow crate-internal SessionEvent lifecycle/task-create/task-cancel protocol, and crate-internal TaskEvent traffic for response messages, tool invocation events, TaskEvent::ToolQuery(ToolSignature) status queries, TaskEvent::ToolStatus(ToolExecutionStatus) returns, cancellation, completion, and closure.

childModules.name: config
childModules.purpose: Strongly typed TOML configuration model and fallible loader that detects the supported host Platform before reading config data, exposes Platform on Config, discovers source/deployed/environment config files, resolves runtime Marix paths relative to the config root, substitutes aliases, resolves credentials, and re-exports the public config surface from mod.rs.

childModules.name: external
childModules.purpose: Crate-local third-party library namespace wrappers that keep direct external crate usage visible through common::external modules, including the newly exposed image ImageReader wrapper plus remoc connection, reqwest, serde, serde_json, tokio, and toml helpers.

childModules.name: logging
childModules.purpose: Common logging module with tagged log messages, structured logging errors, config-gated info/warning/error writes, direct warning/error shortcut functions, debug-build logging, runtime-config-selected log directories under the process role's Marix path plus a fixed log child folder, timestamped log-file creation, and pruning to retain at most 20 log files.

childModules.name: message
childModules.purpose: Folder-based shared message module with request and response traits, chat request envelopes, and ChatResponseSegment task response streaming envelopes.

childModules.name: protocol
childModules.purpose: Shared tool protocol types owned once for both sides of the session boundary: ToolSchema, ToolParameter, ToolInvocation with ToolSignature, ToolType, ToolPreview, ToolError, and ToolExecutionStatus variants that carry the invocation signature.
